title: Puff Pastry Veggie Quiche
ingredients: 2 sheets frozen puff pastry (one 17.3-oz package), thawed
2 cups grated Swiss or gruyere cheese
instructions: Unroll each sheet of puff pastry on a large baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sauté mushrooms and shallots in butter until golden, then drain if necessary.
Place cooked mushrooms, shallots, and steamed asparagus tips on the puff pastry sheets, dividing evenly between the two sheets.
Top each sheet with 1 cup grated Swiss cheese.
Blend the eggs, sour cream, black pepper, salt, and ground nutmeg together in a blender.
Drizzle the egg and sour cream mixture evenly over the top of both puff pastry sheets.
Bake at 400 degrees for 25 minutes or until puffed and golden.
notes: Optional: add goat cheese dollops before baking for extra yumminess.
